Operation 'getGeoPerformancePrompts' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too vague about what performance data is included and what the export returns. Added clarity on expected output format, metrics included, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

data.current_description: Export performance data by prompts for Geo Presence.
data.description_suggestion: Exports performance metrics and analytics data aggregated by prompts for Geo Presence locations. Returns performance data including metrics such as impressions, clicks, and engagement rates organized by prompt. Requires authentication and valid Geo Presence business account.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about what performance data is included and what the export returns. Added clarity on expected output format, metrics included, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

data.current_description: Apply suggested fixes for content optimization.
data.description_suggestion: Applies suggested content optimization fixes to specified pages. Accepts a list of fixes to apply and returns confirmation of applied changes with updated optimization scores. Modifies page content and updates optimization metrics. Requires authentication and valid Geo Presence business account.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about what input is required, what changes are made, and what is returned.
